title: Kimco Realty Corporation Announces 2022 Dividend Tax Treatment
text: JERICHO, N.Y.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Kimco Realty® (NYSE: KIM), North America's largest publicly traded owner and operator of open-air, grocery-anchored shopping centers, and a growing portfolio of mixed-use assets, announced today the allocations of the company's 2022 dividend distributions on its common stock and preferred stock. The allocations as they will be reported on Form 1099-DIV are as follows:

title: Kimco Realty: UPREIT And Away
text: Kimco Realty is demonstrating strong operating fundamentals across its high quality portfolio. Its new UPREIT structure should provide benefits in its ability to attract sellers.

title: Is It Wise to Retain Kimco (KIM) Stock in Your Portfolio Now?
text: Kimco's (KIM) focus on its grocery-anchored centers, mixed-use assets and a solid balance sheet bode well for its growth. However, the rise in e-commerce adoption and higher interest rates are woes.

title: Here's Why Kimco Realty Can Keep Raising Its Dividend
